data.reasoningText:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me use the msbuild-code-review agent to provide a thorough review, and also leverage the directory-build-organization skill knowledge.

Let me analyze what I see:

1. **Duplicated properties across all 5 projects**: TargetFramework, LangVersion, Nullable, ImplicitUsings, TreatWarningsAsErrors, EnforceCodeStyleInBuild, Company, Authors - all repeated in every .csproj
2. **Duplicated DocumentationFile property** in all 3 src projects
3. **Duplicated PrintBuildInfo target** in all 3 src projects


4. **Package version inconsistencies**: Several NuGet dependencies have different versions across projects - Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions ranges from 8.0.0 to 8.0.1, test SDK versions differ between test projects, and xunit packages are scattered across multiple versions
5. **Missing Directory.Build.props file** - this would consolidate all the shared configuration instead of having it scattered across every project file
6. **No centralized package management** - versions are spread throughout individual projects rather than managed in one place
7. **Duplicate build targets** - the PrintBuildInfo target appears in multiple places when it should be centralized

I should spin up a specialized msbuild review to dig deeper into these structural issues.

data.content:
Let me provide the review directly from my analysis while the agent finishes.

Here's a comprehensive review of your build infrastructure:

---

## MSBuild Review — ContosoApp Solution

### 🔴 Critical: No Centralized Build Configuration

All 5 projects duplicate the same 8 properties. You should create **three files** at the repo root:

#### 1. `Directory.Build.props` — Shared properties (evaluated before each .csproj)

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- All src projects generate XML docs -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- All test projects are not packable -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

#### 2. `Directory.Build.targets` — Shared targets (evaluated after each .csproj)

```xml
<Project>
  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build"
          Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>
</Project>
```

#### 3. `Directory.Packages.props` — Central Package Management

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <!-- Shared -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />
    <!-- Test -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

---

### 🟠 Package Version Drift (bug)

The same packages have **different versions** across projects today:

| Package | Core/Api | Services |
|---|---|---|
| `Logging.Abstractions` | **8.0.0** | **8.0.1** |

| Package | Core.Tests | Api.Tests |
|---|---|---|
| `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` | **17.10.0** | **17.9.0** |
| `xunit` | **2.8.1** | **2.7.1** |
| `xunit.runner.visualstudio` | **2.8.1** | **2.5.6** |

Central Package Management (above) fixes this by defining versions in one place. Each `.csproj` then uses `<PackageReference Include="..." />` **without** a `Version` attribute.

---

### 🟡 Simplified Project Files After Cleanup

After applying the above, each project shrinks dramatically. For example:

**ContosoApp.Core.csproj** (was 27 lines → 10):
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

**ContosoApp.Api.Tests.csproj** (was 26 lines → 14):
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" />
    <PackageReference Include="NSubstitute" />
  </ItemGroup>
```
